name: Avidity Golf
address: 3300 Crescent Oaks Blvd, Tarpon Springs, FL 34688
about: Avidity Golf is a specialized golf training venue focused on data-driven instruction using advanced technology. The facility offers private lessons, multi-lesson packages with FlightScope X3 launch monitor analysis, and on-course coaching sessions. It operates as a Club Champion Partner, providing expert guidance tailored to both beginners and advanced players to improve swing technique, short game, and overall performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to advanced FlightScope X3 launch monitor for data-driven swing analysis
Personalized instruction from experienced PGA professionals
Combination of indoor simulation and on-course real-world coaching
Multi-lesson packages for structured improvement plans

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor used for lesson packages and data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clients should bring their own golf clubs, though rentals may be available through the Club Champion pro shop partnership.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted. BYOB is not indicated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Exact timing for 18 holes is not specified, but typical simulator sessions average 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about junior programs or family-friendly features is provided. The focus appears to be on adult instruction.
